\providecommand{\matrixpunct}[1]{\textcolor{black}{\texttt{#1}}}
\providecommand{\matrixratio}[2]{\matrixpunct{(}\textcolor{#1}{\texttt{x#2}}\matrixpunct{)}}
\providecommand{\matrixratioinner}[2]{#2}
\providecommand{\matrixna}[1]{\textcolor{#1}{\texttt{N/A}}}
\providecommand{\matrixnaratio}[1]{\matrixpunct{(}\matrixna{#1}\matrixpunct{)}}
\providecommand{\matrixratiopair}[4]{\matrixpunct{(}\textcolor{#1}{\texttt{#2}}\matrixpunct{|}\textcolor{#3}{\texttt{#4}}\matrixpunct{)}}
\providecommand{\matrixslot}[2]{\makebox[#1][l]{#2}}
\providecommand{\matrixcelljitothree}[4]{\begin{tabular}[t]{@{}l@{\hspace{0.006in}}l@{}}\matrixslot{1.20in}{#1}&\matrixslot{1.12in}{#2}\\\matrixslot{1.20in}{#3}&\matrixslot{1.12in}{#4}\end{tabular}}
\providecommand{\matrixcell}[6]{\begin{tabular}[t]{@{}l@{\hspace{0.004in}}l@{\hspace{0.004in}}l@{}}\matrixslot{1.08in}{#1}&\matrixslot{0.68in}{#2}&\matrixslot{0.68in}{#3}\\\matrixslot{1.08in}{#4}&\matrixslot{0.68in}{#5}&\matrixslot{0.68in}{#6}\end{tabular}}
\providecommand{\matrixrefslot}[1]{\makebox[0.50in][l]{#1}}

\providecommand{\matrixsummarycell}[2]{\begin{tabular}[t]{@{}l@{}}#1\\#2\end{tabular}}
\providecommand{\matrixsummaryfield}[1]{\makebox[0.39in][r]{#1}}
\providecommand{\matrixsummaryfour}[4]{\matrixsummaryfield{#1}\matrixpunct{|}\matrixsummaryfield{#2}\matrixpunct{|}\matrixsummaryfield{#3}\matrixpunct{|}\matrixsummaryfield{#4}}
\providecommand{\matrixsummaryfive}[5]{\matrixsummaryfield{#1}\matrixpunct{|}\matrixsummaryfield{#2}\matrixpunct{|}\matrixsummaryfield{#3}\matrixpunct{|}\matrixsummaryfield{#4}\matrixpunct{|}\matrixsummaryfield{#5}}
